issue: Difficulty: ❌ EASY - Requires at least MEDIUM

agent_report.changes_summary: Hardened reproduce-java-aes-gcm-findings against the EASY difficulty gate by adding frm-014 (post-rotation DB nonce re-registration where a later stale v2 row must not beat a matching v4 registration) and frm-015 (Appendix D override fixed across key rotation), plus an amended frm-006 Appendix D section requiring last-operative-line parsing. Regenerated seed.sql, evidence.gif, the long forensic report, and expected JSON via tools/gen_dataset.py; updated milestone 1/2 instructions and tests; bumped Dockerfile to platform-revision 2026-06-30-r14; fixed a test_m2.py NameError that broke oracle M2; oracle now passes 1.0 and the revised ZIP was resubmitted with updated explanations and milestone rubrics.
